pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: CloudFront CDN implements encryption at rest and in transit. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Infrastructure as Code ensures consistent, repeatable deployments of CloudFront CDN.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Non-production configuration uses smaller instance sizes and reduced redundancy to minimize costs.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: Configurable instance types and resource parameters allow tuning CloudFront CDN for specific workload characteristics.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Consistent resource tagging supports cost allocation and operational visibility. Pulumi state management tracks all infrastructure changes with full audit trail.

features: Encryption at rest and in transit
